ec2.spotfleet.spotplacement.Availability.Description: The Availability Zone.  To specify multiple Availability Zones, separate them using commas; for example, "us-west-2a, us-west-2b".

ec2.spotfleet.spotplacement.GroupName.Description: The name of the placement group.

ec2.spotfleet.spotplacement.Tenancy.Description: The tenancy of the instance (if the instance is running in a VPC). An instance with a tenancy of `dedicated` runs on single-tenant hardware. The `host` tenancy is not supported for Spot Instances.
